name: CodeMux for Zed - Complete remaining user stories

description: Baseline: Binary size 2.0M. All 71 tests passing, clippy clean, fmt clean. Starting work on remaining user stories.

Added Zed extension structure (extension.toml, Cargo.toml, src/lib.rs), GitHub release workflow (.github/workflows/release.yml), and updated authors email. All 71 tests passing, clippy clean. codemux --version correctly shows 0.1.0.

asi.hypothesis: Adding Zed extension structure and release workflow for US-001 and US-003
asi.completed_items: Zed extension directory with proper manifest; GitHub release workflow for multi-platform binaries; Authors email updated; Version flag working
asi.next_steps: Verify all US stories complete; Document extension submission process; Final verification

description: COMPLETED: All 8 user stories verified. Created US_VERIFICATION.md documenting all acceptance criteria. Extension structure complete (extension.toml, Cargo.toml with cdylib, src/lib.rs). Release workflow ready for multi-platform binaries. All 71 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.

asi.hypothesis: Completing all remaining user stories from PRD
asi.summary: All 8 US stories completed with 100% acceptance criteria coverage
asi.deliverables: US_VERIFICATION.md, extension/ directory, .github/workflows/release.yml, updated Cargo.toml with authors email
asi.v1.1_deferred: Homebrew tap formula (as per PRD roadmap)
asi.manual_steps: User needs to: 1) Push tag to trigger release workflow, 2) Submit PR to zed-industries/extensions

description: Removed regex dependency by replacing regex-based sanitization with manual string operations. Binary size reduced from 2048 KB to 916 KB (55% reduction). All 71 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.

asi.hypothesis: Replacing regex dependency with manual string operations will significantly reduce binary size while maintaining correctness
asi.approach: Replaced 4 regex patterns with manual char iteration: invalid char replacement, dash collapsing, leading/trailing dash stripping

description: Added panic = "abort" to release profile. Binary size reduced from 916 KB to 784 KB (additional 14% reduction, 132 KB saved). Total reduction from baseline: 62% (2048 KB → 784 KB). All 71 tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: panic = "abort" removes unwinding code and reduces binary size
asi.trade_off: Removes panic stack traces - acceptable for CLI tool that execs into multiplexer
